title: T-018 — API: WO create + BOM snapshot → wo_materials
prompt:
Implement Server Action `createWorkOrder(input)` per PRD §8.1 (FR-PLAN-017) + §8.2 (FR-PLAN-020). Steps:
1. Auto-select active BOM (FR-PLAN-018) by query `bom WHERE product_id = wo.product_id AND effective_from <= scheduled_date AND (effective_to IS NULL OR effective_to > scheduled_date)` ORDER BY effective_from DESC LIMIT 1. User override allowed.
2. Snapshot bom_items → wo_materials with required_qty = bom_item.qty * (wo.planned_quantity / bom.output_qty) * (1 + scrap_percent/100). Default material_source='stock'.
3. Copy routing_operations → wo_operations (FR-PLAN-019).
4. Create wo_outputs row with output_role='primary', allocation_pct=100% (cascade generation T-019 will adjust for co-products).
5. Calls T-017 for numbering.
6. Status='DRAFT'. Outbox event 'wo.created'.

V-PLAN-WO-001 (planned_quantity > 0). V-PLAN-WO-002 enforced at release time, not create.

RED test asserts BOM snapshot math, primary output insertion, immutable post-release rule.

pipeline_inputs.description: WO creation with BOM snapshot, routing copy, primary output insertion, outbox emit.
pipeline_inputs.details: Single transaction. BOM snapshot is immutable post-release (ADR-002) — service guard refuses updates to wo_materials when wo.status != 'DRAFT'. Co-products + byproducts handled by T-019 cascade generator (separate task). is_rework=true skips BOM lookup; user must provide manual materials.
acceptance_criteria: Given a BOM with output_qty=10 and a bom_item qty=2 + scrap_percent=5, when WO planned_quantity=20 is created, then wo_materials.required_qty = 2 * (20/10) * 1.05 = 4.20.
Given a WO post-create, when wo_outputs is queried, then exactly 1 row exists with output_role='primary' and allocation_pct=100.00.
Given a WO at status='RELEASED', when an attempt to update wo_materials.required_qty is made, then the service refuses with HTTP 409 'WO_RELEASED_MATERIALS_IMMUTABLE'.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/server/actions/planning/__tests__/wo-create.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED tests for snapshot math, primary insertion, immutability post-release, BOM auto-select latest effective_from.
risk_red_lines: Do not mutate wo_materials post-release — ADR-002 immutability is load-bearing.
Do not skip BOM auto-select when bom_id is unspecified — must respect §8.1.
Do not create wo_outputs primary allocation_pct < 100 in non-cascade path.
